{"@timestamp":"2026-03-11T12:37:52.8292375-03:00","@version":"1","message":"Starting scheduled retry processor for failed webhook events","logger_name":"com.leadflow.backend.service.billing.StripeEventRetryScheduler","thread_name":"scheduler-1","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
{"@timestamp":"2026-03-11T12:37:52.8298287-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
    select
        sel1_0.id,
        sel1_0.created_at,
        sel1_0.event_id,
        sel1_0.event_type,
        sel1_0.last_error,
        sel1_0.max_retries,
        sel1_0.next_retry_at,
        sel1_0.payload,
        sel1_0.processed_at,
        sel1_0.retry_count,
        sel1_0.status,
        sel1_0.updated_at 
    from
        public.stripe_event_logs sel1_0 
    where
        sel1_0.status=? 
        and sel1_0.next_retry_at is not null 
        and sel1_0.next_retry_at<=localtimestamp 
    order by
